/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/SoftGPU.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/SoftGPU  src/platform/libplatform.a src/stages/libstages.a src/pipeline/libpipeline.a src/test/libtest.a extern/glad/libglad.a extern/imgui/libimgui.a -ldl /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so src/stages/libstages.a src/pipeline/libpipeline.a src/stages/libstages.a src/pipeline/libpipeline.a src/utils/libutils.a src/profiler/libprofiler.a extern/imgui/libimgui.a -lpthread src/core/libcore.a /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.3
